verification.get_probe_caveat: A GET probe is a weak signal: MCP servers answer over POST, so content shown as unverified-by-GET is expected and is NOT a defect.
verification.note: Verification reflects only what SaSame confirmed from public, outside-in observation. Listed items are UNCONFIRMED, not defects or accusations. Clear any item by claiming (CLAIM.md). Not KYC, legal certification, enforcement, or operator geolocation.

disclaimers: Public endpoint observability only; not KYC, legal certification, enforcement, or operator geolocation.
Identity claims are separated from observed behavior. unclaimed/self_claimed are not verified.
No badness verdict is made about any named agent. The strongest caution is "verify before trust", always clearable by claiming.
